external_references.description: DHS/CISA. (2026, February 11). AR25-338A: BRICKSTORM Backdoor. Retrieved April 16, 2026.

objects.description: [BRICKSTORM](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9015) has the ability to delete files and directories.(Citation: CISA BRICKSTORM UNC5221 AR25-338A February 2026) [BRICKSTORM](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9015) also has deleted installer files after execution to reduce detection.(Citation: Picus Security BRICKSTORM UNC5221 October 2025)(Citation: Google UNC5221 BRICKSTORM SPAWNCHIMERA April 2024)(Citation: NVISO BRICKSTORM April 2025)
